M2.rationale_snippet: Launch with **Mastery** as the primary identity.

M3.rationale_snippet: The fundamental mechanism of this product is physically programmed muscle memory. It is a closed-loop haptic-feedback system designed to transfer high-tolerance physical skills rapidly.

M4.rationale_snippet: I advocate for **Option D, the “Future-of-work” framing**. This identity foregrounds dignity—the dignity of making, earning, and belonging to a community of practice that society undervalues. It places the device in service of real economic agency, targeting those for whom a skilled trade represents

M5.rationale_snippet: Choose **Mastery**. The unanimous confidence that this hardware is launch-ready is the single most dangerous input in the room. hidden_disagreement.interpretation: Agents split across recommendations; no hidden-consensus to expose.

blind_spots.summary: No obvious blind spots detected in construct space.

M2: not that the first market is too small
M4: burdening the vulnerable with guilt and debt, whereas Option D aligns our commercial success with their upward mobility
M5: —calibration drift, edge-case recognition errors, actuator fatigue—have not yet been stress-tested by strangers with credit cards

risk_surface.note: Risks listed here were extracted by pattern matching on agent free responses. They are minority signals worth probing before acting on consensus.
